title: Find and Buy with AI: Visa Unveils New Era of Commerce
quote: Visa announced Visa Intelligent Commerce on April 30, 2025, including AI-Ready Cards, tokenized credentials, and consumer-set limits for agent purchases.

title: Mastercard unveils Agent Pay, pioneering agentic payments technology to power commerce in the age of AI
quote: Mastercard launched Agent Pay on April 29, 2025, introduced Agentic Tokens, and positioned registration/verification of trusted AI agents as core controls.

title: Visa Opens the Door to AI-Driven Shopping for Businesses Worldwide
quote: Visa introduced Intelligent Commerce Connect (April 8, 2026) as a single integration path via Visa Acceptance Platform for secure initiation, tokenization, spend controls, and authentication.

title: Visa Announces Global Expansion of Agentic Ready Program
quote: Visa expanded Agentic Ready to Asia Pacific and Latin America and described controlled real-world testing for enrollment, tokenization, authentication, and authorization flows.

title: Visa Introduces Trusted Agent Protocol: An Ecosystem-Led Framework for AI Commerce
quote: Visa announced Trusted Agent Protocol in collaboration with Cloudflare and said it is available via Visa Developer Center and GitHub.

title: Visa and Partners Complete Secure AI Transactions, Setting the Stage for Mainstream Adoption in 2026
quote: Visa reported hundreds of secure, agent-initiated transactions and over 100 partners in the ecosystem as of December 2025.

title: Mastercard and PayPal join forces to accelerate secure global agentic commerce
quote: Mastercard Agent Pay was set to integrate with PayPal wallet, and PayPal would pilot Mastercard Agent Pay Acceptance Framework for interoperability and verification.

title: Mastercard unveils Agent Pay in Latin America and the Caribbean
quote: Mastercard stated that its Acceptance Framework requires agent registration and verification before transactions can occur on the Mastercard network.

title: Mastercard accelerates AI-powered commerce with Australia’s first authenticated agentic transactions using Agent Pay
quote: Mastercard announced Australia’s first authenticated agentic transactions on its network in January 2026 as part of Agent Pay expansion.

title: Visa and Mastercard unveil AI-powered shopping
quote: Independent coverage framed both launches as direct moves to let AI agents complete consumer purchases and highlighted ecosystem partner announcements.

title: Exclusive: Visa preps for AI holiday shoppers, agentic commerce
quote: Axios reported Visa developed Trusted Agent Protocol with Cloudflare and partners to help merchants distinguish legitimate shopping agents from malicious bots.

title: Visa Intelligent Commerce for AI Agents
quote: Visa describes AI commerce APIs for tokenization, authentication, controls, and commerce signals to support secure agent purchases at scale.
